sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train was replaced for the start of the 2005 season.

fullText:
Serpent Hopi is a steel roller coaster located at OK Corral in Cuges-les-Pins, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.



Brown track and supports.

The train was replaced for the start of the 2005 season.
